name: generate_image_local
description: Generate an image using the local ComfyUI server with Anima model

input_schema.name: input
input_schema.description: User request about what image to generate

nodes.action:
ローカル画像生成用のプロンプトを作成してください。Animaモデルは自然言語の英語プロンプトを受け付けます。Stable Diffusionスタイルのタグ構文（カンマ区切りの単語列）ではなく、詳細で具体的な自然言語の描写文を英語で書いてください。

## Prompt Writing Guidelines
- Write in natural English sentences, NOT comma-separated tags
- Be specific about composition, lighting, colors, mood, and art style
- Include details about the subject, their pose, expression, and clothing
- Describe the setting/background and atmosphere
- Specify the art style (e.g., "anime-style digital painting", "photorealistic", "watercolor illustration")

## Good Example
"An exquisite masterpiece illustration of a young woman sitting by a window in a cozy cafe. She has long flowing silver hair and gentle blue eyes. She is wearing a soft cream-colored sweater and reading a leather-bound book. The scene is illuminated by warm afternoon sunlight streaming through the window, casting golden highlights on her hair. Art style: High-quality anime-style digital painting with soft cinematic lighting and a warm, peaceful atmosphere."

## Bad Example (DO NOT write like this)
"1girl, silver hair, blue eyes, cafe, window, reading, sweater, masterpiece, best quality"

Also provide a concise Japanese title for the generated image.

title.description: 画像の題名（日本語、アイテム名として使用）

prompt.description: Detailed image generation prompt in natural English (NOT SD-style tags)

negative_prompt.$literal: worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, blurry, jpeg artifacts, sepia
